title: Getting a Myki & Surviving PTV
summary: Learn the minimum transport system knowledge to move confidently.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: First commute. Everyone taps through and you are still decoding zones and platforms.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: Public transport feels simple for everyone else and chaotic for you.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Most first-week transport stress disappears once one recurring route is stable.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Set up Myki, save your top-up pattern, and rehearse your most important weekly route.

Use the Free Tram Zone and cap rules to avoid unnecessary spending.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find stations, tram stops, and top-up points near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Finding a GP Before You Need One - before a bad day becomes a crisis.
